ai_ml_competitions.mood: Benchmark arena with dataset gates and leaderboard climbs.

content_and_social_growth.mood: Audience currents, reply windows, trend blooms, and reputation gates.

minigame.mechanic: Collect high-fit topics while avoiding spam, voice, and account-action gates.

digital_products_templates_plugins.mood: Forge templates, polish packs, validate demand, and unlock listing routes.

minigame.title: Foundry Run
minigame.mechanic: Turn local proof artifacts into shippable bundles while marketplace gates stay visible.

lead_generation_and_sales.mood: Offer cards, qualification locks, outreach routes, and opt-out safety rails.

minigame.title: Offer Route
minigame.mechanic: Match leads to offers only after policy, targeting, and channel gates are satisfied.

local_trading_strategy_research.mood: Paper-only simulations, risk bands, drawdown locks, and backtest checkpoints.

minigame.title: Paper Trial
minigame.mechanic: Move through data quality, out-of-sample, slippage, and no-real-money gates.

money_source_discovery.mood: Venue maps, opportunity fog, scan routes, and launch-candidate beacons.

minigame.title: Venue Mapper
minigame.mechanic: Reveal new paths by proving source freshness, payout clarity, and first-proof feasibility.

paid_code_bounties.mood: Issue boards, duplicate-check locks, payout signals, and patch-route gates.

minigame.title: Claim Scout
minigame.mechanic: Score candidates by payout clarity, duplicate risk, testability, and approval readiness.

platform_engineering.mood: Schemas, queues, traces, adapters, and safety gates holding the company together.

minigame.title: Systems Grid
minigame.mechanic: Stabilize the control plane by connecting evidence, task, request, and trace systems.

prediction_market_research.mood: Paper replays, source-of-truth clocks, rules locks, and no-trade safeguards.

minigame.title: Settlement Replay
minigame.mechanic: Replay data-only market hypotheses while eligibility, fee, and treasury locks remain closed.

security_bounty_private_reports.mood: Private-report routes, scope walls, duplicate sentries, and testing approval gates.

minigame.title: Scope Run
minigame.mechanic: Advance only through verified program scope, safe static proof, and private-route readiness.

submitted_bounty_payouts.mood: Payment evidence, owner-selection locks, response drafts, and user approval gates.

minigame.title: Payout Vault
minigame.mechanic: Track payout state without taking ownership of wallet, payment, or public-response actions.
